2604.08070.title: AtlasOCR: Building the First Open-Source Darija OCR Model with Vision Language Models
2604.08070.paper_summary: Darija, the Moroccan Arabic dialect, is rich in visual content yet lacks specialized Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tools. This paper introduces AtlasOCR, the first open-source Darija OCR model built by fine-tuning a 3B parameter Vision Language Model (VLM). We detail our comprehensive approach, from curating a unique Darija-specific dataset leveraging both synthetic generation with our OCRSmith library and carefully sourced real-world data, to implementing efficient fine-tuning strategies. We utilize QLoRA and Unsloth for parameter-efficient training of Qwen2.5-VL 3B and present comprehensive ablation studies optimizing key hyperparameters. Our evaluation on the newly curated AtlasOCRBench and the established KITAB-Bench demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, challenging larger models and highlighting AtlasOCR's robustness and generalization capabilities for both Darija and standard Arabic OCR tasks.
2604.08070.paper_summary_zh: 達里賈，摩洛哥阿拉伯語方言，擁有豐富的視覺內容，但缺乏專門的光學字符識別（OCR）工具。本文介紹了AtlasOCR，首個開源的達里賈OCR模型，通過微調一個3B參數的視覺語言模型（VLM）而構建。我們詳細說明了我們的綜合方法，從策劃一個獨特的達里賈專用數據集，利用我們的OCRSmith庫進行合成生成，以及精心挑選的真實世界數據，到實施高效的微調策略。我們利用QLoRA和Unsloth對Qwen2.5-VL 3B進行參數高效訓練，並呈現全面的消融研究，以優化關鍵超參數。我們在新策劃的AtlasOCRBench和已建立的KITAB-Bench上的評估顯示出最先進的性能，挑戰更大的模型，並突顯AtlasOCR在達里賈和標準阿拉伯語OCR任務中的穩健性和泛化能力。
2604.08070.author: Imane Momayiz et.al.
2604.08070.authors: Imane Momayiz, Soufiane Ait Elaouad, Abdeljalil Elmajjodi, Haitame Bouanane
